hypothesis: If the hidden-state embeddings from diverse scientific foundation models for molecules, materials, and proteins converge to a universal latent representation, then cross-model similarity measured by CKNNA and IDCor will be high across architectures and modalities and will be stronger for in-distribution data (QM9, sAlex, OMat24) than for out-of-distribution data (OMol25), indicating a shared, architecture- and modality-agnostic representation of matter.
